privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated Snipe-IT data injected dynamically via setup_task.sh. Analysis of the setup, export, and verifier scripts confirmed that the targeted insurance claim number is explicitly required to be 'IC-2025-0342', and the generated summary report must reside exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/insurance_claim_IC-2025-0342.txt'.
